holdings.infoBox: QTUM is an equity ETF with a total of 82 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 3.20%, Intel at 2.63%, Marvell Technology at 2.60%, STMicroelectronics at 2.52%, and MediaTek at 2.36%.

overview.description: The Defiance Quantum ETF (QTUM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund tracks an adjusted-equal-weighted index of companies involved in the research and development of quantum computers. QTUM was launched on Sep 5, 2018 and is issued by Defiance.
infoTable: BlueStar Quantum Computing and Machine Learning Index
